_metadata.description: District documents referenced (linked) inside board agenda memos but hosted OFF the board portal — so they are not captured as board-packet attachments in document-index.json. Hand-curated; each entry cites its source meeting and agenda item. These are indexed into site search by title (see SEARCH.md) so a search like 'facilities master plan' links directly to the document.
_metadata.source: Simbli board agendas — memo body 'Link to file' references (data/board-memos/*.json)
_metadata.method: Manually captured; bit.ly short links resolved to their canonical/CDN target with curl -IL

documents.title: Final Facilities Master Plan (FMP), 2025 (PDF)
documents.itemTitle: Adoption of Final Facilities Master Plan
documents.note: Adopted 2025-06-11 as the District's official long-term facilities roadmap, guiding Measure S bond construction projects. Hosted off BoardDocs due to file size and linked from the agenda memo.
